title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 0–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Raizo, Unknown person #4, Tama as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ne0; lotion

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't slack off!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: man... that was so satisfy- ing to watch yesterday...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Rumours of the confrontation have....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter where we go in the prison, those two are being talked about!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shhhh! They'll hear you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The quarry

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Straw hat-guy! You're amazing! Which family are you a part of?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Man... you guys sure are annoy- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Sir Straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My words cannot ex- press...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How thankful I am to you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: for saving my life yester- day.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good for you, Grandpa Hyogorou!! But you'll be kick- ing the bucket soon enough, though!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just happened to be there, that's all. Don't worry about it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Here, take these.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't eat, you won't have enough strength to keep work- ing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your meal exchange tickets!! They'll notice if you give me this many!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I won't let these go to waste....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You have my utmost thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You have my utmost thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What a weird guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Luffy- Dono...!!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: RAIZO!! How'd it go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My apologies for making you wait.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I managed to find the key to your cuffs, how- ever...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's being heavily guarded!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: SILIRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Give some kibidango... to me, too...!!

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: CARIBOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not getting any. Go work for it yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: POOF!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that we can work while wearing them... but I still can't move well in these...

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: You're planning a prison-breakie, aren't ya!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you GIMME some KIBIDANGO, I'll be your subordinate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been in this prison longer than you... so I know quite a bit about this place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: caribou is one of the super rookie that recently made it to the 'new world'.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me come, too!! I'll do anything you ask of me!

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: Caribou's Trivia

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we team up, we'll have nothing to fear...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just go and team up with spike- guy!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
